system-profile.description: System performance profiling -- find the bottleneck

commands.comment: load average vs CPU count -- load > ncpu means saturation
top processes by CPU right now
memory pressure -- pageouts mean real trouble
disk space on critical mounts -- 90%+ needs attention
disk I/O throughput -- high wait% means disk-bound
all listening TCP ports -- what's actually running
TCP connection states -- too many TIME_WAIT or CLOSE_WAIT is a leak
